title: Pride & Groom Dog Shampoo - Keeps Your Dog Fresh and Clean | Soothing and Nourishing (Aloe Vera & Kiwi, 500ml)
features: SOOTHING DOG SHAMPOO: Enriched with aloe vera, these shampoos soothe delicate skin while gently cleansing. Perfect after a muddy park run, they keep dogs comfortable, calm and clean.
FRESH KIWI SCENT: The uplifting kiwi fragrance tackles strong odours, making it ideal as dog shampoo for smelly dogs. Even after beach walks or wet weather, coats are left smelling bright and fresh.
500ML FAMILY SIZE: The generous 500ml bottle ensures plenty of washes for both small and large breeds. A practical choice for busy pet households, ready for use after every adventure.
NOURISHES COAT & SKIN: Aloe vera helps hydrate and nourish, leaving fur shiny and skin soothed. After long countryside walks or playtime in the garden, coats feel healthy and cared for.

SHINY, HEALTHY COAT: Regular use helps promote a glossy, easy-to-manage coat. Perfect before grooming sessions or pet shows, it enhances natural shine while keeping fur free from dirt and lingering odours.
FOR EASY GROOMING: These shampoos make grooming sessions smoother, with a silky finish that is easier to brush. Perfect for regular dog grooming routines, reducing knots and tangles after washing.
TACKLES MUDDY MISCHIEF: Perfect for washing off dirt and grime after woodland trails or rainy walks. These shampoos leave pets looking pristine and smelling delightful in minutes.
BRIGHT, CLEAN RESULTS: These shampoos deliver a squeaky clean finish that shows instantly. Great before family visits, trips to the groomer, or simply enjoying cuddle time on the sofa.
TRUSTED BY PET OWNERS: Pride & Groom offers dog shampoo created with care for everyday grooming. Whether used on pampered pups or playful companions, this formula helps pets feel loved.
SAFE FOR REGULAR USE: Designed for frequent baths, these shampoos are mild yet effective. Ideal for dogs that love swimming, rolling in grass, or exploring, keeping coats clean without harshness.
